sectionsUnavailable: Local-user official StrateGene source output is not supplied in this fixture.
Full 161-page StrateGene report content beyond the six public excerpt pages is unavailable.
Proprietary pathway scoring, dirty/clean interpretation logic, supplement protocols, clinical labs, medication context, pregnancy context, and professional review are unavailable.

resultRows.item: StrateGene official output and proprietary logic
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample excerpt is available for output-format parity, but local-user official StrateGene output, pathway scoring, methylation model, detox model, neurotransmitter model, hormone context, and supplement protocol are not supplied.
resultRows.sourceLabel: Seeking Health StrateGene Report; StrateGene sample report; MedlinePlus Genetics: What DTC genetic test results mean
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can show what the public sample looks like and which evidence is missing, but it cannot recreate StrateGene or infer local-user pathway conclusions.

resultRows.item: Supplement, folate, medication, pregnancy, lab, and professional-review context
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Clinical history, lab values, medications, pregnancy context, supplement use, and qualified professional interpretation are not supplied unless explicitly listed in the fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts; MedlinePlus Genetics: MTHFR; FDA Dietary Supplements; NIH Office of Dietary Supplements Fact Sheets; MedlinePlus Pharmacogenetic Tests
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The output should remain educational because folate, supplement, medication, pregnancy, and pathway decisions require validated context and professional review.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Public sample excerpt prepared for FemaleHet; six PDF pages expose internal report pages 1, 2, 76, 82, 83, and 150 of 161.
resultRows.description: The cover identifies StrateGene, Seeking Health, SAMPLE REPORT status, and a FemaleHet sample profile.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed public StrateGene sample-output structure for FemaleHet only; it is not a local-user genotype, pathway score, supplement protocol, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible pathway map includes Folate, Methionine, SAM, Homocysteine, Phosphatidylcholine, Histamine, Hydrogen Peroxide, Glutathione, Water, and pathway nodes including MTHFR, MTR, PEMT, COMT, DAO, MAOA, NOS3, GST, and GPX.
resultRows.description: The page also shows the testing key and symbol/color legend for checked genes and slow, intermediate, fast, complicated, or checked-but-not-found states.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed public StrateGene sample-output structure for FemaleHet only; it is not a local-user genotype, pathway score, supplement protocol, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible Folate pathway page includes SLC19A1, DHFR, FPGS, TYMS, FTCD, ATIC, MTHFD1, MTHFD1L, MTR, SHMT, MTHFS, and MTHFR nodes with folate-cycle intermediates.
resultRows.description: Use the page to preserve output-section structure only; do not infer proprietary pathway state, methylation status, or supplement protocol.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed public StrateGene sample-output structure for FemaleHet only; it is not a local-user genotype, pathway score, supplement protocol, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: MTHFR C677T rs1801133 (+/-, GA), MTHFR A1298C rs1801131 (+/-, TG), and an MTHFR C677T / A1298C haplotype found.
resultRows.description: The visible notable-variation panel and small table expose two MTHFR rsIDs, aliases, variant alleles, calls, and a haplotype-found label for the sample person.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed public StrateGene sample-output structure for FemaleHet only; it is not a local-user genotype, pathway score, supplement protocol, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible sections include 'Dirties your MTHFR gene' and 'Cleans your MTHFR gene' with environment, lifestyle, food, supplements, and medications headings.
resultRows.description: These headings are preserved only as observed report structure; the scaffold does not turn them into local detox, medication, supplement, diet, or treatment recommendations.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed public StrateGene sample-output structure for FemaleHet only; it is not a local-user genotype, pathway score, supplement protocol, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability claim.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible +/- rows for SLC19A1 G80A TC, DHFR 19bp Del/Ins DI, MTHFD1 G1958A GA, MTHFD1 T105C TC, MTHFR C677T GA, MTHFR A1298C TG, FTCD C301T CT, SHMT1 C1420T GA, and TYMS Ins/Del ID.
resultRows.description: Use aliases, calls, variant alleles, and +/- results as public sample-table structure; non-MTHFR SNP rsID cells in this table are glyph-encoded and must remain unavailable unless independently sourced.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is observed public StrateGene sample-output structure for FemaleHet only; it is not a local-user genotype, pathway score, supplement protocol, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability claim.

thirdPartyToolContext.plainEnglishMeaning: StrateGene is treated as a third-party report surface. This local package preserves visible public sample-output structure and marks unavailable official output, model logic, and clinical context instead of guessing them.
thirdPartyToolContext.professionalReview: Personal decisions about supplements, folate questions, medications, pregnancy, labs, and pathway interpretations require validated testing scope, source-output provenance, clinical context, ancestry applicability when relevant, and qualified professional review.

references.title: MedlinePlus Genetics: Interpreting Genetic Test Results
MedlinePlus Genetics: What DTC genetic test results mean
NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores
CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts

genotypeSummary.observedValue: official StrateGene output, pathway-score logic, methylation model, detox model, neurotransmitter model, hormone context, supplement protocol, clinical labs, medication list, professional review, and authenticated sample-report rows unavailable in this fixture
clinical diagnosis, symptoms, family history, medications, professional interpretation, and decision context unavailable in this fixture

Public FemaleHet sample excerpt shows the Super Seven map, Folate pathway map, MTHFR notable-variation rows, MTHFR C677T rs1801133 GA +/-, MTHFR A1298C rs1801131 TG +/-, and Folate advanced-table structure.

genotypeSummary.effect: Sample report marks MTHFR C677T as +/- with variant allele A.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Sample report states this C677T / A1298C haplotype is found; do not convert to local health, pregnancy, supplement, or treatment claims.

genotypeSummary.effect: Sample report marks MTHFR A1298C as +/- with variant allele G.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Sample report states this C677T / A1298C haplotype is found; do not convert to local health, pregnancy, supplement, or treatment claims.

genotypeSummary.genotype: SLC19A1 G80A TC; DHFR 19bp Del/Ins DI; MTHFD1 G1958A GA; MTHFD1 T105C TC; MTHFR C677T GA; MTHFR A1298C TG; FTCD C301T CT; SHMT1 C1420T GA; TYMS Ins/Del ID
genotypeSummary.effect: The visible Folate advanced table marks each listed row as +/- in the sample report.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: This preserves sample-table structure only; non-MTHFR rsID values are glyph-encoded in the sample and should remain unavailable.

missingInputs: Local-user official StrateGene report output and source-tool run metadata.
Full 161-page report content beyond the six public excerpt pages.
Proprietary pathway scoring/model logic, dirty/clean interpretation logic, methylation, detox, neurotransmitter, hormone, and supplement-protocol models.

Use public StrateGene sample rows only as observed output structure; report proprietary pathway scoring, dirty/clean interpretation logic, full 161-page content, supplement protocols, local user's official StrateGene output, clinical labs, medications, pregnancy context, and professional review unavailable.
uncertainty: No calibrated StrateGene model with source provenance, clinical context, and professional review is supplied for this local package.
The visible MTHFR GA/TG calls belong to the public FemaleHet sample report and must not be treated as local-user genotypes.
Non-MTHFR advanced-table SNP rsID cells are glyph-encoded in the sample excerpt and remain unavailable unless independently sourced.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence and public sample-output structure only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not recreate unavailable proprietary StrateGene scoring, dirty/clean pathway logic, supplement protocols, treatment guidance, or clinical interpretation.
The package does not support diagnosis, personal risk estimates, medication decisions, pregnancy conclusions, supplement dosing, detox recommendations, or clinical actionability claims.
